articles.description: Decentralized options exchange OptiFi, a project on the Solana blockchain, has come to an unexpected halt after its development team accidentally shut down the mainnet and locked up funds during an attempted upgrade. articles.description: Crypto lending platform Nexo has allocated $50 million to buy back its native NEXO token as part of an ongoing initiative designed to bolster the stability and profitability of its ecosystem.

articles.title: Argentine Province of Mendoza to Accept Stablecoins for Tax Payments
articles.description: The fifth most populous province of Argentina will now accept cryptocurrencies, especially stablecoins, for tax payments, according to the Mendoza Tax Administration (ATM).
